findings.title: Image user should not be 'root'
findings.description: Running containers with 'root' user can lead to a container escape situation. It is a best practice to run containers as non-root users, which can be done by adding a 'USER' statement to the Dockerfile.
findings.fix: Add 'USER <non root user name>' line to the Dockerfile

findings.title: No HEALTHCHECK defined
findings.description: You should add HEALTHCHECK instruction in your docker container images to perform the health check on running containers.

findings.title: Unused dependency: [object Object]
findings.description: Package '[object Object]' is listed in dependencies but not used.

findings.title: Unused dependency: sanitize-html
findings.description: The package 'sanitize-html' is defined in package.json but never used in the codebase.

findings.title: Unused dependency: lodash
findings.description: The package 'lodash' is defined in package.json but never used in the codebase.
